A bug fix for off-site tagging.

## Fixed

- **Adding a tag to a snapshot no longer fails on the off-site repository with a "repository is already locked" error.** Tagging was the only repo-writing step that didn't first clear a stale restic lock — the kind left behind when an off-site replication or integrity check is interrupted (a network hiccup, or the container restarting mid-run) — so a leftover lock on the off-site repo blocked the tag until you manually clicked Unlock. Tagging now clears a stale lock first (as backups already do), and off-site replication and integrity checks now clear a stale lock too, so one no longer lingers on the off-site repo in the first place. The internal `p1` marker tag also no longer shows up as a stray chip in the snapshot list. (#29, thanks @manilx)

---
